---
type: lesson
title: The Test Crusade
---

Greetings, brave developer! You have chosen the path of righteousness: automated testing. In this lesson, we shall embark on a glorious crusade to vanquish bugs and ensure the stability of your C++ code. With `cpp-e2e-test-gen` as our weapon, we are invincible! Or, you know, at least less likely to ship broken code.

Let the crusade commence our quest!
